'''Jing''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Miner/Legends|miner]] on [[Katanos VII]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the colony's own [[Cloning/Legends|cloned]] [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] creatures.
